ball, while Roscommon will confront the
Munster county in hurling. About the
probable result of the hurling tie there can
scarcely be twoopinions. Roscommon are
much in the same hurligg class as Galway,
and Cork have demonstrated an immense
superiority over Galway several times this
season.

But the football game should prove somne-
what diff-reat. Leitrim were the surprise
packet of Connacht football this season, and
proved shemselves only slightly inferior, if
at all, to the Provincial champions, ‘Ros-
common, The latter put up a great fight
against Kerry in the All-Ireland semi-final,
which abour puts Cork and Roscommon on
# level footing. Consequently Leitrim’s
chance of winning acc practically as gvod
The game should be a godd
fone, a5 well as a ciose one,
